payload.summary: Implemented the local CLI worktree mutation invariant in a managed worktree, including the reusable checkout policy guard, skill workflow updates, runtime skill sync, operator documentation, and verification evidence.
completed_work: Added skills/shared/checkout_policy.py with tests for shared checkout blocking, worktree allow, harness allow, and explicit sync-point allow.
Updated mutating skill instructions and autopilot phase metadata so planning, exploration artifacts, validation evidence, fixes, and quick-task write mode run in managed worktrees.
Updated operator docs to remove local-main planning language and document PR/sync-point convergence.
Verified with focused pytest, coordinator-backed integration tests, OpenSpec strict validation, and work-package validators.

decisions.title: Use checkout policy as executable guard
decisions.rationale: A shared helper lets mutating skills reject local shared-checkout writes consistently while preserving isolated harness and explicit sync-point workflows.

decisions.title: Treat validation evidence as write-capable autopilot work
decisions.rationale: Validation phases can emit artifacts and fixes, so autopilot now requests worktree isolation for validate and validation-review phases.

next_steps: Open the feature PR and route it through review before any main-branch sync point.
